acquisition method: The MS operated in positive ion mode using DDA Top8 method.
alkylation reagent: alkylated by adding 2.5 μl of 375mM IAA (30 min, room temperature in the dark)
alkylation concentration: alkylated by adding 2.5 μl of 375mM IAA
cleavage agent: digested using 1 μl of trypsin (1 mg/ml, Promega; trypsin-to-protein ratio 1:35)
collision energy: HCD fragmentation was performed at step collision energy (29% and 35% NCE)
fragmentation method: HCD fragmentation was performed at step collision energy
instrument: High resolution LC-MS/MS analysis of TMT-labelled peptides was carried out using an Ultimate 3000 RSLCnano system coupled to a Q Exactive Plus mass spectrometer
ionization type: Ionisation was achieved using nanospray Flex ion source
labeling: performed a tandem mass tags qualitative and quantitative proteomic analyses
reduction concentration: by adding 2.5 μl of 200 mM DTT
